articles.title: Ancient Killer Is Rapidly Gaining Resistance to Antibiotics, Study Warns
articles.description: A study reveals that Salmonella Typhi is developing antibiotic resistance, posing a renewed threat. This ancient pathogen remains dangerous, especially in developing regions.
articles.impact: Increased resistance could lead to public health crises.

articles.title: The Chrome browser is getting a big safety upgrade — if you use Windows
articles.description: Google's Chrome introduces Device Bound Session Credentials, enhancing security against cookie theft. This feature is now available for Windows users.
articles.impact: Improved security enhances user trust in Chrome.

articles.title: Amex Platinum Cardholders Can Save $200 on the New, Slimmer Oura Ring
articles.description: Oura's new Ring 5 is 40% smaller and offers a $200 discount for Amex Platinum cardholders. The updated design includes enhanced durability features.

articles.title: Proton Mail just made ditching Gmail way less painful
articles.description: Proton Mail now allows users to import Gmail messages, enhancing privacy and ease of transition. This feature strips ads and trackers from imported emails.
articles.impact: Encourages users to switch to Proton Mail.

articles.title: Raid Boss 2 now available
articles.description: Borderlands 4 introduces Raid Boss 2: Subjugator and Thol the Invincible in its Version 1.7 update. This dual-boss fight is free for all players.
articles.impact: Enhances gameplay experience for Borderlands fans.

articles.title: 9 Of The Best Features Added To Spotify In 2026 (So Far)
articles.description: Spotify introduces new features enhancing user experience, including a Taste Profile for personalized recommendations. These updates aim to improve music discovery.

articles.title: Krafton have reportedly agreed to pay Subnautica 2's devs that $250 million bonus, following strong early sales
articles.description: Krafton is set to pay a $250 million bonus to Unknown Worlds, the developers of Subnautica 2, following successful early sales. This resolves previous legal disputes.

articles.title: The Google Fitbit Air's 'one size fit' does not fit all
articles.description: Concerns arise over the Fitbit Air's 'one size fits all' design, which some users find uncomfortable. Feedback highlights sizing issues for smaller wrists.
articles.impact: Calls for improved product design from Fitbit.

articles.title: Dragon Quest 40th anniversary event reveals DQ12 restart with new title, DQ11 Switch 2 port, and the return of Dragon Quest Monsters series
articles.description: Square Enix announces updates for Dragon Quest during its 40th anniversary, including a restart of DQ12 and a Switch 2 port of DQ11. The Monsters series is also returning.
articles.impact: Excites fans for upcoming Dragon Quest releases.
